title: cylindropuntia imbricata subsp. spinosior
intro: Cylindropuntia imbricata subsp. spinosior, also known as the tree cholla, is a type of cactus species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. The tree cholla has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of the tree cholla include wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various ways.
